## Verification

- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] Workbench build or audit, if frontend-related
- [ ] `git ls-files data cards sources .loom-local docs/research` prints nothing

## Data Safety

- [ ] No private source material, card data, SQLite databases, `.env` files, or generated Workbench bundles are included.
- [ ] Public user-facing docs are updated in both `README.md` and `README.zh-CN.md` when relevant.
